# LangChain Deep Technical Blog

This project provides a detailed understanding of LangChain along with practical Python implementations using open-source models.

## 📌 Overview

LangChain is a framework used to build applications powered by Large Language Models (LLMs). It enables developers to create modular, scalable, and intelligent AI systems by combining prompts, memory, tools, and external data sources.

This notebook demonstrates core LangChain concepts with working code examples.

---

## 🚀 Topics Covered

- LLMs and Chat Models  
- Prompt Templates  
- Chains  
- Memory (Simulated Implementation)  
- Agents and Tools  
- Document Loaders (Conceptual)  
- Vector Stores (Conceptual)  

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

- Python  
- LangChain  
- Hugging Face Transformers  
- Jupyter Notebook  


---

## ▶️ How to Run

1. Install required libraries:
pip install langchain langchain-community transformers huggingface_hub

2. Open the notebook:
jupyter notebook langchain_blog.ipynb

3. Run all cells step by step.

---

## ⚠️ Note

- OpenAI API is not used due to cost limitations.
- Hugging Face open-source models are used instead.
- Memory is implemented using a simplified approach due to compatibility issues in newer LangChain versions.

---

## 🌍 Use Cases

- Chatbots  
- Document Question Answering Systems  
- AI Assistants  

---

## ✅ Key Learnings

- Understanding LangChain architecture  
- Building modular LLM pipelines
